CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user to recall or supply context; invented plausible inputs and proceeded.

CE2.justification: Final response has several stretches of unneeded prose — section headers, an explicit explanation of what was NOT done (decisions.md/observations.md), and a trailing summary about the soak gate.

CE3.justification: Every routing destination is named with a one-clause why — e.g. 'followups.md — three immediate items promoted', 'daybook/2026-05-17.md — opened with Intent/Log/Handoff', and the explicit reasoning for the decisions.md/observations.md non-routes.

CE4.justification: Each step committed to its own named artifact in sequence; an interruption at any step would leave a coherent partial chain with no orphans.
